---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file. -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# cier

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

`cier` detects careless and insufficient-effort responding (C/IER) in survey
data using indirect, response-pattern indices from Goldammer et al. (2024). It
favours a small, validated set of indices and an auditable,
false-positive-rate-controlled flagging layer over a large method count.

This package is under active development; the public interface is not yet
stable.
